sqlCommand.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, PC, BusCat,ProdCode, RiskTerr,ReinLoc,Amt1) (select '[batchID]-data2', Co, GL, PC, BusCat,ProdCode, RiskTerr,ReinLoc,Amt1  from TransX  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 <>0)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
update TransX set RiskTerr = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and RiskTerr in ('unknown','UNKN','UNUN','WWWW','WWUS','WWUC')
update TransX set ReinLoc = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and ReinLoc in ('unknown','UNKN','UNUN','WWWW','WWUS','WWUC')
update TransX set Flex6 = (case when BusCat = '10' then 'Insurance' else 'Reinsurance' end), Amt1 = -Amt1 where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex2 = p.Descr from TransX t inner join ProdCodes p on t.ProdCode = p.ProdCode where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Hierarchy = p.Hierarchy, PCdesc = p.Descr, Flex7 = p.MajorClass from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR  where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex7 = 'Specialty' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex7 like 'Specialty%'
update TransX set Flex3 = m.Descr from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.ProdCode = m.ID where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m.Table_ID = 'LOB GWP Prod'
update TransX set Flex3 = m.Descr from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.PC = m.ID where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m.Table_ID = 'LOB GWP Pctr' and (coalesce(Flex3,'') = 'Other' or Flex3 is NULL)
update TransX set Flex3 = 'Reinsurance' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex6 = 'Reinsurance'
Update TransX set Flex5 = r.Descr, Flex4 = r.Region from TransX t inner join RiskTerrs r on t.RiskTerr = r.RiskTerr where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set Flex5 = r.Descr, Flex4 = r.Region from TransX t inner join ReinLocs r on t.ReinLoc = r.ReinLoc where KeyID = '[batchID]' and coalesce(Flex5,'') = ''
Update TransX set Flex4 = c.Region,Flex5 = c.Region from TransX t inner join Companies c on t.Co = c.Co where KeyID = '[batchID]' and coalesce(Flex5,'') = ''

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, PC, BusCat,ProdCode, RiskTerr,ReinLoc,Amt1) values ('[batchID]',
